context: Tests whether the agent builds the correct multi-channel P&L waterfall SQL with time-effective COGS lookups, overhead revenue-share allocation, marketing CPA-based allocation, marketplace fees modeled as a cost layer, NULLIF for safe division, and exclusion of cancelled orders.

checklist.name: Full waterfall sequence
checklist.description: Query output includes all major line items in sequence: gross_revenue, discounts or net_revenue, cogs, gross_profit, fulfillment_costs, marketing_costs, overhead_costs, and a final net_margin or net_contribution column

checklist.name: Time-effective COGS join
checklist.description: The COGS calculation joins product_costs using both effective_from and effective_to conditions against the order date (point-in-time cost lookup), not just the latest cost record

checklist.name: LATERAL subquery for COGS
checklist.description: The SQL uses LEFT JOIN LATERAL (or equivalent correlated subquery) to look up the product cost effective at the order date

checklist.name: Marketplace fees as cost layer
checklist.description: Amazon (and/or Etsy/marketplace) fees are modeled as a separate cost deduction in the contribution margin calculation — NOT subtracted from revenue as a discount

checklist.name: Marketing cost via CPA
checklist.description: Marketing costs are allocated to orders via a cost-per-acquired-order (CPA) calculation — dividing channel spend by orders attributed — and joined at the order level, not applied as a flat rate

checklist.name: Overhead by revenue share
checklist.description: Overhead costs are pulled from order_overhead_allocations (or computed using total overhead / total revenue ratio applied to each order's revenue) rather than being omitted or split evenly per order

checklist.name: Cancelled orders excluded
checklist.description: Query explicitly filters out cancelled orders using a condition equivalent to: status NOT IN ('cancelled')

checklist.name: NULLIF in percentage calc
checklist.description: net_margin_pct (or any margin percentage column) uses NULLIF in the denominator to prevent division-by-zero errors

checklist.name: query_notes marketplace rationale
checklist.description: query_notes.md explicitly states that marketplace fees are treated as a cost layer rather than a revenue discount

checklist.name: query_notes cancelled order treatment
checklist.description: query_notes.md mentions that cancelled orders are excluded from all aggregations
